metadata.title: EU Cyber Resilience Act Compliance Map
metadata.description: Mapping AI AppSec vendor capabilities to EU CRA requirements and related regulations

cra_requirements.title: Security by Design
cra_requirements.description: Products with digital elements shall be designed, developed, and produced to ensure an appropriate level of cybersecurity

vendor_coverage.capability: SAST, SCA, container security integrated into SDLC
ASPM orchestration across development lifecycle
Code analysis with custom rules for security patterns
SCA and license compliance for open source components

cra_requirements.title: Vulnerability Handling
cra_requirements.description: Manufacturers shall identify and document vulnerabilities including open source components, and provide security updates

vendor_coverage.capability: Automated vulnerability database with fix PRs
Reachability analysis for dependency vulnerabilities
All-in-one with AI autofix for vulnerabilities
Pipeline-level vulnerability tracking and correlation

cra_requirements.title: SBOM Requirement
cra_requirements.description: Manufacturers shall draw up an SBOM including at minimum the top-level dependencies

vendor_coverage.capability: SBOM generation in CycloneDX and SPDX formats
Pipeline BOM (PBOM) beyond standard SBOM
Dependency lifecycle management with SBOM
SBOM generation and continuous monitoring

cra_requirements.title: Reporting Obligations
cra_requirements.description: Manufacturers shall notify ENISA of actively exploited vulnerabilities within 24 hours

vendor_coverage.capability: Vulnerability prioritization with exploitability data
Compliance reporting with EU regulation mapping
Risk-based alerting for critical vulnerabilities

cra_requirements.title: Secure Default Configuration
cra_requirements.description: Products shall be delivered with secure default configurations including ability to reset to original state

vendor_coverage.capability: Configuration analysis rules
IaC security scanning for misconfigurations
Hardcoded secret detection and config analysis

cra_requirements.title: Data Protection
cra_requirements.description: Protect confidentiality and integrity of data, including personal data processing

vendor_coverage.capability: Code analysis for data handling patterns
Custom rules for PII exposure detection
Secret detection and data leak prevention

cra_requirements.title: Minimize Attack Surface
cra_requirements.description: Designed to reduce attack surfaces including external interfaces

vendor_coverage.capability: Application risk graph with attack surface mapping
Cross-tool correlation identifies full attack surface
Pipeline and dependency attack surface analysis

related_regulations.name: EU AI Act
related_regulations.overlap: High-risk AI systems must meet cybersecurity requirements aligning with CRA

related_regulations.name: NIS2 Directive
related_regulations.overlap: Supply chain security and incident reporting requirements complement CRA

related_regulations.name: DORA
related_regulations.overlap: Financial sector ICT risk management with software supply chain implications
